hero.title: Emergency Checklist
hero.description: Prepare reusable private emergency checklists with categories, items, notes, completion tracking, reset, archive, and restore workflows.

flow.title: Plan → Check → Reset
steps: Build reusable checklists with ordered items
Mark items complete, reset checklists for review, and archive stale plans

differences.title: Preparedness planning, not live response
differences.description: Emergency Checklist stores user-authored preparation lists. It does not provide SOS, alerts, GPS rescue, dispatch, disaster monitoring, medical advice, or external emergency data.

items.title: Create reusable checklists
items.description: Maintain fire, medical, storm, travel, vehicle, home, child safety, elder care, pet, workplace, personal, and other preparedness lists.

items.title: See completion clearly
items.description: Each checklist shows completed items, remaining items, and completion percentage.

items.title: Reset for repeated preparation
items.description: Reset marks every item incomplete so the checklist can be reviewed again.

feel.title: Calm, private, and practical
feel.description: The workflow keeps preparation organized without making emergency promises.

items.title: Simple
items.description: Checklists and items are easy to scan and update.

items.title: Reusable
items.description: Reset turns a checklist back into a preparation run.

items.title: Bounded
items.description: No alerts, maps, rescue flows, public data, AI advice, or external APIs.

audiences.title: Who uses Emergency Checklist
audiences.description: Emergency Checklist is useful for people who want private preparation lists before urgent situations happen.

items.title: Individuals
items.description: Prepare personal, travel, vehicle, medical, or home readiness lists.

items.title: Families
items.description: Organize child safety, elder care, pet, fire, storm, and power outage preparation.

items.title: Workers
items.description: Maintain workplace or commute readiness checklists.

resourceSection.title: Preparedness essentials
resourceSection.description: A focused workspace for private emergency preparation.

items.title: Checklists
items.description: Create, edit, delete, archive, restore, complete, reset, search, filter, and paginate reusable checklists.

items.title: Items
items.description: Create, edit, delete, complete, reopen, and order checklist items.

items.title: Categories
items.description: Group checklists by emergency context with color and sort order.

groupedSection.title: From category setup to repeat review
groupedSection.description: Emergency Checklist supports a reusable preparedness loop.

items.name: Categories
items.description: Group preparedness plans by emergency type.

items.name: Checklists
items.description: Create reusable plans with descriptions and item notes.

items.name: Completion
items.description: Mark items complete and review percent complete.

items.name: Reset
items.description: Return a checklist to incomplete for another preparation cycle.

technicalSection.title: Aligned with the Ansiversa platform model
technicalSection.description: Emergency Checklist uses the shared shell, generated contracts, isolated backend ownership, and shared UI patterns.
items: Protected routes inside the persistent Ansiversa shell.
Isolated emergency checklist database and owner-scoped APIs.
Shared drawer forms, confirmation dialogs, pagination, feedback, and empty states.
